New Delhi, the 16th March, 2016 S.0. 1173(E).—In excrcise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) of section 38L of the Wild Life (Protection) Act, 1972 (53 of 1972), the Central Government hereby appoints the following member to the National Tiger Conservation Authority for a period specified against their name with effect from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette and for that purpose makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change vide number S.0. 1403(E), dated the 4™ Scptember, 2006, namely: In the said notification, for serial number, 5 and the cntries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entrics shall be substituted namely:— =¥ Shri P. Bhattacharya, - Member Member of Parliament (Rajya Sabha) (He shall hold office till he ceases to be a Member of Rajya Sabha, ie. up to 18.8.2017).". [F.No.15-25/2009-NTCA] B.S. BONAL, Addl. Director General of Forests (Project Tiger) Note:The principal notification constituting the National Tiger Conservation Authority was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, vide notification S.0. 1403(E), dated the 4" Scptember, 2006 and subscquently amended as follows:- L S.0.
